log: === INITIATIVE ===

Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 3/67
⚡ Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:9 total 19 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician casts Greater Invisibility (4th level)
Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician for 6. HP: 9/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
